articles.title: 'Fingers on the trigger': Deadly warnings for Iranians being urged to take action
articles.summary: Iran's police chief has warned that his forces would treat anyone taking to the streets "at the enemy's request" as an enemy.

articles.title: China approves 'ethnic unity' law requiring minorities to learn Mandarin
articles.summary: The law states that children should be taught Mandarin before kindergarten, until the end of high school.
